name: Bill's Fantastic Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, food processor, or by hand, combine the first five ingredients and form a paste.
2. When fully combined, add the red wine vinegar (or your choice of vinegar) and continue blending until fully emulsified.
TIPS:
You may substitute 1/2 cup of honey for sugar. Adjust ingredient amounts to your taste after following the recipe exactly. Some have even added a few anchovies during the initial step. Enjoy experimenting with this delicious dressing.
